Submitted final result text:
FINAL_ANSWER: A hybrid approach combining a MaxRects-based spatial decomposition with a priority-driven local search refinement.
JUSTIFICATION: GRP (Greedy Rectangle Placement) fails due to fragmentation and sub-optimal area-minimization logic. A MaxRects-based approach maintains larger free spaces for longer, while priority-driven local search allows for adjusting rectangle boundaries to better match target areas without violating point containment or overlap constraints.
